specializations: Herbasol® Ferment - fermentation-derived botanical actives (launched Jan 2026)
product_highlights: Herbasol® Ferment - new fermentation-derived botanical actives (launched January 2026)
Enhanced bioavailability vs. conventional botanical extracts
Swiss quality with 50+ years of ingredient expertise
Sustainable fermentation with low environmental footprint
notes: Swiss ingredient specialist Lipoid Kosmetik has expanded into fermentation biotechnology with the January 2026 launch of Herbasol® Ferment — fermentation-derived botanical actives with enhanced bioavailability. This bridges their traditional phospholipid expertise with modern fermentation science. Particularly valuable for microbiome-friendly formulations and postbiotic skincare. Kosher and Halal certified.
